validation_command: python -c "import re; schema_path='Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/schema.sql'; schema=open(schema_path,encoding='utf-8').read(); wellness_table=re.search(r'CREATE TABLE public\.wellness_post.*?(?=CREATE TABLE|ALTER TABLE|\Z)',schema,re.DOTALL); assert wellness_table,'FAIL: wellness_post table not found'; table_def=wellness_table.group(); assert 'conversational_feedback' in table_def,'FAIL: conversational_feedback column missing'; assert 'conversation_completed' in table_def,'FAIL: conversation_completed column missing'; alembic=open('Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/alembic_state.txt').read(); assert '0068' in alembic,'FAIL: migration 0068 not applied'; print('PASS AR_157: wellness_post schema conversacional OK (migration 0068)')"
